name: determine_recipient
description: Determine the notification recipient (student vs admin) based on agent type and status. Returns recipient email, recipient_type, cc, and whether to skip.

agent_type.description: The type of agent that processed the request (e.g. deployment_complete, student_sp_config, troubleshooting)

status.description: The processing status (e.g. success, failed, needs_input, complete)
